assignment: AT1 - Identify Opportunities for AI Task Automation

section1.title: Business Overview
section1.content:
"BlueBush" is an Eco-Friendly company that is dedicated to selling only products that tick the eco-friendly box. This covers are large range of bespoke homeware products. Premium sustainable Australian homewares. Ethically sourced, beautifully crafted, built to last.

They are an online only store, adding further sustainability to their business. Therefore, they are an online e-commerce business offering direct-to-consumer products.

The business is small in size only requiring minimal employed people to handle online orders, customer service, stock taking, and order deliveries.


Their Key Values:


  • Sustainability First
  • Community Focused
  • Quality Craftsmanship
  • Transparency
